The Shot Across the Bow
Module 3
The Shot Across the Bow
• One of the best tools in the Pre-Prelaunch
• Fantastic if you have a new offer
• Great way to find out what your prospects are
thinking
• Also a great way to get testimonials
• Thousands of PLF Owners have used this
technique with great success
The Shot Across the Bow
• An old naval term
• A warning shot to let them know something is
coming
• Your Pre-Prelaunch is about letting your market
know something is coming (without telling them
directly)
• A big part of the message is that it’s not quite
ready yet (so you can’t actually be selling it yet)
